title: No Bed Explosion in End / No Dragon Cheese
description: Stops beds and respawn anchors from exploding in the end so they can't be used to cheese the ender dragon
body:
This datapack stops beds and respawn anchors from exploding in the end, so the players have to actually fight the ender dragon instead of just blowing it up and exploiting 'intentional game design'.


Be aware that this datapack won't work on minecraft realms as it is considered an experimental change.
